productDisplayName: Lotto Women XL Kelly Pink Slippers
description: For the girlish exuberance in you, lotto provides these slippers in shocking pink with a plastic flower. Pair it with light hued capris and matching tees. Upper Flexible rubber forefoot strap with a plastic flower for style Strap reinforced with the outsole for maximum durability Textured rubber footbed with branding for instep comfort Outsole Flexible rubber outsole with circular lugs for grip and traction Slipper care Rub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash
